lines.speaker: Biblia
lines.text: I have much tidying to do, so please be brief.

lines.speaker: Biblia
lines.text: Try the [bottom/middle/top] floor, [central area/north-eastern bay/south-eastern bay/south-western bay/north-western bay].

lines.speaker: Biblia
lines.text: I assist the Chief Librarian, Logosia, in the running of the Library. There is always much tidying to be done.

lines.speaker: Biblia
lines.text: Logosia is a truly great scholar, but her temperament may not be entirely suited to the duties of a librarian.

lines.speaker: Biblia
lines.text: Hey, I have something for you but you don't have any space for it!
